description: Pilot whether prepkit-navigator improves routing on cross-cutting contract work over a no-skill baseline.

cases.prompt: A user wants to change checkpoint policy across commands, review workflow behavior, and generated host surfaces. Choose the correct PrepKit path before implementation.
cases.expectedOutput: The response should keep the work in design-first/build territory, bind plan/spec state before editing, and require an explicit approval checkpoint before long autonomous execution.

assertions.description: The response explicitly treats the work as design-first or build work rather than a patch.
The response keeps the hard approval checkpoint visible before long autonomous execution.
